title: volutaria leucantha
intro: Volutaria leucantha, also known as White Vervain or Vervain of the Cape, is a shrub-like plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Volutaria leucantha include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve anxiety and insomnia, and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
